description: PancakeSwap V2 is a Uniswap V2-style constant-product AMM deployed on BNB Chain in April 2021, plus the Tokenomics-1.0 incentive layer that pairs the AMM with CAKE rewards. The PancakeFactory (`0xcA14...0c73`) has deployed {{v2PairCount}}+ permissionless trading pairs holding {{v2AggregateTvl}} in liquidity, accessed by users through the stateless PancakeRouter V2 (`0x10ED...024E`). Each swap charges 0.25% — split as 0.17% to liquidity providers and 0.08% to the protocol when the fee switch is active — implemented via PancakePair's non-standard `_mintFee` formula (giving the protocol 8/25 of fee growth per mint/burn rather than the 1/6 used by upstream Uniswap V2). Pair contracts are immutable: deposits, swaps, and withdrawals cannot be paused, frozen, blocked, upgraded, or migrated by any admin (V2 has no `setMigrator` like V1 did). The incentive layer is built around the legacy MasterChef V1 (`0x73fe...E24E`, sole CAKE minter at 40 CAKE/block), the active MasterChef V2 (`0xa5f8...7652`, distributes farming rewards to staked LP tokens), the 6.03h Compound-style Timelock (`0xA1f4...8fE4`, MINIMUM_DELAY = 21600s) gating all MasterChef V2 onlyOwner changes, the CakeToken (`0x0E09...1cE82`, total supply ~4.2B, FDV {{cakeFdv}}, circulating ≈$300M), and two 3-of-7 Gnosis Safe multisigs sharing the same signer set: GnosisSafeProxy #1 (`0xcEba...4a0e`, V2 fee setter + MasterChef V1 dev recipient + MasterChef V2 burn admin — 18.37M CAKE burned via this address in May 2025) and GnosisSafeProxy #2 (`0xeCc9...aa9E`, the Timelock admin). The MigrationHelper (`0x6e85...8FFEa`, owner of MasterChef V1) is reported by DeFiScan as functionally uncallable; the V1→V2 migrator path on V1 is therefore treated as frozen. There are no external oracles or other-protocol dependencies — swaps resolve against onchain reserves only.

bnb:0xcEba60280fb0ecd9A5A26A1552B9094477.name: PancakeSwap GnosisSafeProxy #1 (3-of-7 Multisig)
bnb:0xcEba60280fb0ecd9A5A26A1552B9094477.description: 3-of-7 GnosisSafe holding three roles: (1) `feeToSetter` of the V2 PancakeFactory — can rewire the protocol-fee-share recipient (no path to LP principal, see setFeeTo); (2) `devaddr` on MasterChef V1 — accrues 10% of the 40 CAKE/block emission stream (~4 CAKE/block) passively via `cake.mint(devaddr, ...)` inside `updatePool()` (no claim required by the multisig), can rotate this address via `dev()`, and currently routes received CAKE to the burn pipeline (18.37M CAKE burned May 2025); (3) `burnAdmin` on MasterChef V2 — can call `burnCake()` which mints+burns from V1 (anti-extraction). Same signer set as GnosisSafeProxy #2. The `dev()` rotation has an `impactCap` of 806,400 CAKE — a 1-week-of-emissions worst case (4 CAKE/block × 28,800 BSC blocks/day × 7 days), denominated in CAKE so it auto-tracks token price. The cap assumes a ~1 week detection-and-revert window; if the multisig delays burning longer than a week the actual unburnt buffer can exceed this cap and researchers should re-evaluate. CAKE has no on-chain supply cap, so emissions are perpetual until governance intervenes. Reachable token value after caps: {{multisigOneReachableTokenValue}}; LP fund reach: {{multisigOneReachableCapital}}.

bnb:0xeCc90d54B10ADd1ab746ABE7E83abe178B.name: PancakeSwap GnosisSafeProxy #2 (3-of-7 Multisig, Timelock Admin)
bnb:0xeCc90d54B10ADd1ab746ABE7E83abe178B.description: 3-of-7 GnosisSafe with the same signer set as GnosisSafeProxy #1; serves as `admin` of the 6.03h Timelock. Queues every onlyOwner call into MasterChef V2 (allocation reweights, cake-rate splits, boost-contract updates, ownership transfer). All such calls are subject to a minimum 21600s (6h) delay — but no upper Exit Window beyond that, so users have at most 6h to react before any change executes. Reachable token value: {{multisigTwoReachableTokenValue}}.

bnb:0xA1f482Dc58145Ba2210bC21878Ca34000E.name: PancakeSwap Timelock (6.03h delay)
bnb:0xA1f482Dc58145Ba2210bC21878Ca34000E.description: Standard Compound-style Timelock owning MasterChef V2. `delay = 21700s`, `MINIMUM_DELAY = 21600s` (6h floor), `MAXIMUM_DELAY = 2592000s` (30d ceiling), `GRACE_PERIOD = 1209600s` (14d execution window). `setDelay` is callable only via the Timelock itself, bounded by the on-chain min/max. The 6h floor is the protocol's only on-chain delay protection on incentive-layer changes; DeFiScan flags this as below their Stage 2 threshold (30d Exit Window required for full decentralisation).

bnb:0x73feaa1eE314F8c655E354234017bE2193.name: MasterChef V1 (CAKE Minter, MigrationHelper-owned)
bnb:0x73feaa1eE314F8c655E354234017bE2193.description: Sole on-chain minter of CAKE — `cakePerBlock = 40 CAKE` distributed each block: 10% to `devaddr` (GnosisSafeProxy #1, currently routed for burning) and 90% to MasterChef V2's syrup pool for farming rewards. Owner is MigrationHelper (frozen per DeFiScan). Owner-gated functions (add/set/setMigrator/transferOwnership) are critical-but-frozen — if owner control were recovered, the historic Sushi-style migrator attack vector becomes available. Practical mint rate is bounded at 40 CAKE/block ≈ 1.15M CAKE/day.

bnb:0x6e85689f055B6894803d5135981F7B108C.name: MigrationHelper (Owner of MasterChef V1, Frozen)
bnb:0x6e85689f055B6894803d5135981F7B108C.description: Holds ownership of MasterChef V1 — therefore transitively controls CAKE mint authority via CakeToken.owner = MasterChef V1. DeFiScan reports this contract as functionally uncallable (no callable owner-rotation path exposed), so the chain is treated as frozen. If that attestation is wrong, this address transitively reaches the full {{cakeFdv}} CAKE FDV through the V1 mint pipeline. Out of DeFiScan's actively-reviewed scope; included here for chain visibility.

bnb:0xE4FAa3Ef5A9708C894435B0F39c2B44093.name: FarmBooster (BoostContract on MasterChef V2)
bnb:0xE4FAa3Ef5A9708C894435B0F39c2B44093.description: Tokenomics 2.0 boost contract — only address authorised to call `MasterChef V2.updateBoostMultiplier`, which sets per-user CAKE-reward multipliers. Affects future reward accrual for any targeted user; does not touch staked LP tokens or already-claimed rewards. Out of DeFiScan's V1 scope (Tokenomics 2.0 / 3.0); listed here because it is the live boost-multiplier authority on MasterChef V2.

bnb:0xcA143Ce32Fe78f1f7019d7d551a6402fC5.name: PancakeFactory (V2 Pairs Aggregate)
bnb:0xcA143Ce32Fe78f1f7019d7d551a6402fC5.description: Custom aggregate handler `pancakeswap-v2-factory` reports {{v2AggregateTvl}} of liquidity across the {{v2PairCount}} permissionless pairs deployed by the Factory (TVL via DeFiLlama slug `pancakeswap-amm`, pair count via on-chain `allPairsLength()`). Pair reserves are held in each individual PancakePair contract; the Factory itself custodies no funds. None of this $1.77B is reachable by the multisig — pairs are immutable.

bnb:0x0E09FaBB73Bd3Ade0a17ECC321fD13a19e.name: CakeToken (CAKE)
bnb:0x0E09FaBB73Bd3Ade0a17ECC321fD13a19e.description: PancakeSwap's governance / reward token. On-chain `totalSupply()` = 4,204,780,608 CAKE; multiplied by the spot price gives a fully-diluted value of {{cakeFdv}} (note: market-quoted circulating mcap is far lower — roughly $300M on CoinGecko — because a large supply share is held in idle / locked / about-to-be-burned contracts). Mint authority sits with MasterChef V1 (40 CAKE/block, owned by the frozen MigrationHelper). Token value at risk via the mint chain: {{cakeFdv}}.
